description: A single large schema change or backfill takes a long lock, stalling production queries and spiking replication lag.
body: Failure mode: an ALTER TABLE that rewrites the table or one massive UPDATE holds a lock for minutes, blocking reads/writes and causing replicas to fall far behind. Detection signals: query timeouts and connection pile-up during the migration; replication lag climbs sharply; the DB shows a long-held lock on the table. Do not run a table-rewriting change or unbatched backfill on a live hot table. Safer fallback: use online/concurrent DDL (CREATE INDEX CONCURRENTLY, online schema-change tools), split backfills into throttled resumable batches, monitor lag and back off, and schedule heavy steps in a low-traffic window.
